## Validation

- [ ] Backend build/test ran or the reason it could not run is documented.
- [ ] Frontend build/test/lint ran or the reason it could not run is documented.
- [ ] Tenant isolation and backend authority were considered for changed behavior.
- [ ] Documentation was updated for changed architecture, routes, DTOs, state, deployment, or operations.
